response.global_summary: This video is a segment from a Ninomae Ina'nis concert, featuring an introductory segment where she talks to the audience and reveals her outfit, followed by an ending screen for the concert sneak peek with instrumental background music. No vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis interacts with the audience, reveals her concert outfit, and introduces the next part of the show, counting down.
The concert sneak peek concludes, and a 'Drawn to Dawn' concert graphic appears on the screen while instrumental background music plays.
